content: Aldric avoided close relationships throughout his adult life due to the grief of losing his entire family to the plague.
Aldric had already built a thriving swordsmith business in Meros by 1055 — a full decade before leaving Varen.
Aldric returned to Meros and resumed his trade after being exonerated and released from the Fortress of Kael in 1068.
Aldric died inside the Fortress of Kael and never regained his freedom.
During his imprisonment Aldric formed a close bond with a learned man who taught him literacy.
